backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map application backend on the Internet Computer. Integrates blob storage, access control, and registry mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three popup UI improvement features (World Travel, Time Zone, Global Control) to their respective frontend component files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc library via CDN and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing tabbed management of journeys, schedules (keyed by journey title), travel spots, music albums, and geographic/timezone data with full CRUD dialogs.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console; renders nothing visually.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: A React component for managing city photo/video albums, supporting file uploads, media removal, and social media link management with authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React component for managing a geonames city database, supporting CSV file import, paginated browsing, search, and CRUD operations for city records.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A React component that renders a 10-heart rating widget supporting full, partial, and empty heart states with hover effects and click-based fractional rating input.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-based interactive 3D globe component with features including country borders, city markers, timezone overlays, solar terminator, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, fetching schedule data and displaying day-by-day activities with whimsical Comic Sans styling and amber color palette.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: Renders a vintage postcard/retro-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying the schedule with serif fonts, postmark effects, and an amber-red color scheme.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, using blob storage for file uploads and backend mutations for persistence.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: A dialog-based authentication panel that handles Internet Identity login and logout, displaying the user's principal ID and current auth status.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as markers with popups, supporting zoom controls, city filtering, and a dialog for adding new bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube, Instagram) for a travel spot, with carousel navigation for images.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting creation, editing, deletion, and file uploads of albums and individual songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with an empty state for unauthenticated or album-less users.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component that handles audio playback with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls, syncing with an external current song selection and user layout preferences.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to a backend canister and IndexedDB caching with a manual multi-step execution flow.
React panel that displays journey cards grouped by status (live/upcoming/past), with options to view schedules, doodle itineraries, retro itineraries, and trigger map or flight animations.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: React component for managing travel spots (CRUD), including city filtering, media file uploads, social media link validation, and heart-based ratings via backend queries and mutations.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: React panel that aggregates and displays travel spots and bookmarks grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: React settings dialog for global website layout preferences including music player visibility, default search place, travel spot display, ripple size, and city font size, persisted via backend mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper functions to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file that defines all data-fetching and mutation hooks for the app, including journeys, locations, music, social links, schedule items, and geocoding utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (including sidebar and music player colors), and applies base heading color rules for different background contexts.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, along with test cases for solstices and equinoxes.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying the Intl API against a GeoJSON timezone dataset.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data, using IndexedDB as a local cache and falling back to a backend fetch, with validation and window-level caching.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, with support for quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered regions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map explorer page supporting 2D/3D globe toggle, location search, timezone selection with live UTC time display, and panels for travelogue, music, admin, and vibes features.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for styling schedule items by day index, including day label generation, color assignment, and human-readable date formatting.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups and sorts schedule items by calendar day and time, then builds per-day route data with chronologically ordered coordinates for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Country Map Explorer' describing three pending popup layout improvement features (World Travel, Time Zone, Global Control) with versioning and feature request metadata.
